name: Common Cents Travel Plaza
description: Sinclair-branded 24-hour travel plaza at I-90 Exit 20 on the north side of Sheridan with diesel, a deli/restaurant, showers, laundry, a trucker lounge and truck parking.

name: Love's Travel Stop #965
description: Love's first northern-Wyoming travel stop, opened December 2024 at I-90 Exit 58 (US-16 E) near the I-25 junction, with about 64 truck spaces, 6 diesel lanes, 4 showers, laundry, Arby's, RV dump and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale #3528 at Love's #965
description: Certified CAT Scale (#3528) co-located at the Love's Travel Stop at I-90 Exit 58 in Buffalo; open 24 hours.

name: Cenex Zip Trip #60 - Buffalo
description: 24-hour Cenex truck stop at the Buffalo I-90/I-25 junction (via I-25 Exit 299, Hart St) with about 20 truck spaces, 5 diesel lanes, 2 showers, laundry, bulk DEF and RV dump.

name: Sheridan I-90 Port of Entry / Weigh Station
description: WYDOT/Wyoming Highway Patrol port of entry and weigh station on I-90 near mile 16 (both directions) between Ranchester and Sheridan; PrePass accepted, with oversized out-of-service parking.

name: Sheridan I-90 Rest Area & Information Center
description: WYDOT rest area and information center on I-90 near mile marker 23 at Sheridan, both directions, with restrooms, a covered picnic area, RV dump and separate truck and passenger parking.

name: Bighorn Diesel & Equipment
description: Heavy-duty truck and equipment repair shop in Sheridan (CAT and Cummins) offering diesel repair and mobile/roadside service for trucks and fleets near I-90.

name: Gills Point S Tire & Auto Service - Sheridan
description: Full-service tire dealer on N Main St near I-90 Exit 20 (formerly Peerless Tires), selling and servicing car, truck, commercial and agricultural tires.

name: Super 8 by Wyndham Sheridan
description: Motel just off I-90 Exit 20 on N Main St with a large lot that accommodates car, truck and RV parking.

name: Days Inn by Wyndham Sheridan
description: Hotel near I-90 Exit 25 on E Brundage Lane advertising free large-vehicle (truck and RV) parking.
